title: panicum stramineum
intro: Panicum stramineum, also known as Striped Panic Grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Panicum stramineum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and treat digestive issues. The herbal preparation of this plant typically involves drying the leaves and stems, which can then be used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
